Using NetExec

NetExec performs password spraying by attempting authentication against multiple domain accounts over protocols such as SMB, LDAP, WinRM, and MSSQL to validate credentials.

Advantages

Supports multiple protocols, enables flexible targeting, and can validate credentials across different services.

Disadvantages

Authentication attempts can be logged and detected by security monitoring solutions, may generate more network traffic especially over SMB, and may trigger account lockout policies.

Using Password Against Multiple Users

nxc smb 192.168.1.101 -u /path/to/users.txt -p Summer18 --continue-on-success

Resources

NetExec Password Spraying
